boardgame: Operation Thunderclap: The Sixth Army's Last Chance
description:
The Last Chance to Save an Army

Operation Thunderclap is a simulation of the attempted German breakout of the Sixth Army which was surrounded in Stalingrad during mid-December 1942. The Sixth Army, Hitler’s largest force, is sent to capture Stalingrad. However, Stalin had prepared an effective snare; Circle around the city and keep the Sixth Army penned inside until their supplies ran out. To make matters worse, the Sixth Army was further prevented from leaving by Hitler’s own order: Remain in Stalingrad and await rescue. 
 Each of the players assumes one of the sides in this fateful encounter. The German player must attempt to defeat the Russian armies and penetrate the area known as the Stalingrad Pocket. The Russian player’s task is simple; hold the pocket long enough to rout the Sixth Army.

—description from the publisher

Night Iris is a single-card micro expansion for Blossoms.

After the game setup, shuffle the night iris into the deck.

When you draw the night iris during the Growth action, you must immediately put it into a chosen pot with a flower, even one with a special action token.

If you draw the card using the Pruner action, add it to your hand – you can use it any turn you want.

Once you play the night iris, discard all cards in the pot, including the night iris.

Playing the card ends your turn.

The expansion "Forbidden Meadow" introduces new mechanics, e.g. Law Cards or new methods of finishing Missions. It also enables direct fights between Stworza and a new Stworze enters the fray: Drugost.

Cthulhu rises in the world of Kharnage! You have no more choice to be more powerful than him by destroying more units or by banishing him!

Cthulhu is an expansion for Kharnage, drawn by Goomi.

—description from the publisher

Game changes:
SET UP
Set a Horror pile with 3 Cultists cards, 1 card from the Shoggoth and 1 card from Cthulhu (except the head). Shuffle this pile and put it face down next to the Domination tokens.

END OF THE ROUND
During the Domination token distribution, the 4th player who destroyed the most cards draws 1 card from the Horror pile. If it is a Cultist or the Shoggoth card, deploy it in your Army (and immediately take the other parts of the Shoggoth if necessary). Otherwise, the Master of R’lyeh, Cthulhu himself, appears!

Set the 9 cards of Cthulhu between 2 players.

During each next End of the Round phases, before the Domination token distribution, Cthulhu attacks each player separately with all its Strength with its 3 Crushing skill symbols. During the Domination token distribution, Cthulhu is considered as a player.

The player who destroyed Cthulhu suffers the Cthulhu’s Revenge and keeps the 9 cards for the Domination token distribution.

The cards which are parts of Cthulhu are not casted face down on the Hill at the end of the End of the Round phases because Cthulhu cannot die, it is just banned. The player who destroyed it keep the Cthulhu’s Head with its 3 Domination points.

END OF THE GAME
Cthulhu may win the game.

description:
Fire Opal Games and Arc Dream Publishing bring you the grudge match to end them all: WRESTLENOMICON!

Become a Great Old One and slam, smash, and obliterate your opponent. Wrestlenomicon is a throw-down to the doom. This furious card game of squicky battles sets up in seconds and plays in minutes—or longer, if tactics are your thing. This is the definition of brainy beer-and-pretzels fun, with plenty of tentacles.

Each deck of cards represents a unique Great Old One. The core game includes a deck for CTHULHU—the Ageless Abomination! the South Seas Smasher!—and another for HASTUR, the insane and unspeakable force behind the King in Yellow. More Great Old Ones are coming.

description:
Abrana is an two player abstract racing game. Each player will have one pawn and six markers. You start the game at the edge of the gameboard (a six by six grid) Each turn you will jump over empty spaces placing your markers OR over markers to turn them black OR  jump at a marker removing it from the grid OR if within reach jump at your opponent removing her from the game. Game ends as six markers of one color is placed OR if one player is removed.

Your objective is to get most markers of your own color onto the grid before the end of the game. The winner is the player with the most markers of its own color at the end of the game.

—description from the designer

Fast and fun dice bluffing game

It's tough out here in the old west but your gang of outlaws recently “discovered” a stash of gemstones. Must be your lucky day. Now all you've got to do is divide it up. Of course you want the bigger half, but the desert is too unforgiving to risk a gun fight. So you play a game of chance. That doesn’t mean you’ll play fair though...

Gem Hustle is dice game for 2 to 5 players. Roll the highest each round to claim gems, but you can only roll each dice once. With only a few high value dice, do you chance it on your own or team up with others but share the spoils?

Rounds are played until players have used all their dice or until there are no more gems left to be won. In a round players will;


     Stash - players take it in turns to add gems to the grey bag.
     Pick - players choose which dice they are going to roll.
     Hustle - players can chose to team up with other players and share the stash.
     Roll - players roll their dice. The players with the highest total claim the stash.


—description from the designer

40th Panzer Korps is a company/battalion level simulation of the battles in the vicinity of the old Napoleonic battle ground of Borodino just west of Mozhaysk. The players control the 40th Panzer Korps and elements of the Soviet’s 5th Army. The game uses the 48th Panzer Korps system, which emphasizes the special abilities of the various arms, armour, infantry and artillery.  The German player must use his powerful forces to open the road to Moscow and victory.

description:
The players start with one pawn on space 1. Movement is determined with one die. The first player to reach space 90 wins the game. On some spaces events hinder or benefit the players.

Some events cause the player to start with a secondary pawn to rescue the primary one, which has to stay on it's space till the secondary pawn arrives. If this is achieved the primary pawn moves again and the secondary one waits on this space till it may be needed again. To win the game only the primary pawn needs to reach space 90.

"Keep On Mr. Sergeant"

Service message:
Dear adults and kids,

This is an exciting game resulting many cheerful moments and much more mind-breaking minutes. First of all you will need some ingenuity and combination skills to be able to win.

The venue of the game is an imagined army base where several comic situations may occur. They are governed by 203 coloured cards decorated with artistic graphics. One of he aims of the game is to acquire the Secret Plan and forward it to the sergeant by the most creative way. Meanwhile we should be careful not to be seized to prison (however the prison works with half board service) or not to blurt any secrets in the pub in delirious state. We should decide tactically during our turn of duty whether we take risk or just take part in the barrack contest of „who knows better the canteen-keeper's woman.

But the surprise of the game is still left: the evolvement of  ’ant’, ’chameleon’, and ’hyena’… Those have the best chance to win who can conform to the constantly changing situation rather than choosing a permanent strategy. Any lags can be caught up with clever decisions. This is a real brain training. You can have several hours amusement by learning the duty service regulations.
Wish you many clever decisions, good luck and lots of fun,
                                the happy Sergeant

—description from the publisher (translated)

boardgame: Fields of Arle: New Travel Destination – Baltrum
description: Feuerland started a set of new travel destinations. You can get them in the towns printed on the travel destination.

It is not the richest family, but you have to live something, so you want to manage it. To start your business, you have to have some animals, so you can compete with larger businesses.
The Székely Gazdálkodó tries to put you into situations that characterize the everyday life of the Székely people. Of course, there are some funny scenes that are just for fun. In Székely Gazdálkodó's board game, you can feel like a real host who is a master of your own farm and strives to get out of the ordinary people. We wish a good farming!

Christmas Tree: Essen Special Cards is a mini-expansion for Christmas Tree that consists of two extra objective cards.

Usable: With the normal and advanced game.
Objective: 6 points for each formation containing 3 ornaments: 2 glass ornaments with the same color and shape on both sides of a gingerbread/wrapped candy.
Setup: Shuffle the 2 Special cards into the deck.

During the game: At the beginning of the round, after  the ornament cards are dealt, if you have a Special card in your hand, put it face up into the middle of the table and draw a new ornament card from the remaining deck. After you have chosen your objective cards as usual, place them from the Special card(s) separately (in the advanced game, after the objectives went around.).

The Special cards are objective cards, but not in a standard way. During the evaluation of the objectives at the end of the round, you can choose one (or two) Special card(s) from the table (if there is any), instead of one (or two) original objective card(s). You will evaluate the chosen Special card(s), instead of the chosen original card(s) (but the other players still can use the original objectives).

This way you will score the same number of objectives as usual, but you will have the option to choose a Special objective card - which maybe better fits your christmas tree - instead of one of the original objectives.

Apply the boss sticker at the back of both their respective tokens (1 for each clan).

Those tokens now play like any other explorer tokens but have an ability that can be triggered once per game:
 In case of a tie, the boss power can be activated to win the territory on which it is located. If both bosses are activated on the same card, no one wins.

Promo found in Plato Magazine 109.

boardgame: Nothing Personal: Justino "The Player" Gotlibi Promo Card
description:
A special Gangster card from Just Got Played‘s Promo card giveaway.

“When Justino is drawn and placed, immediately swap him with the Capo (influence tokens remain on the Capo).”

Three additional Emotion cards.

Simply shuffle these new cards to their respective decks.
Usual rules apply.

Promo found in Plato magazine 109.

Penciltown is a solitaire town-building strategy game with heavy random elements. It's print-and-play, and uses a pencil, an eraser and two d6s.

It's played entirely on a mostly-blank sheet of paper: you draw the town yourself. The writing is thematically dense, and is more or less low fantasy.

Each round, you roll to see how productive your town is. You then get to forage for additional resources, spend accumulated resources to improve your town, or mount a quest. You also roll to see whether an event occurs each round. Events are interactive, and can involve a decision. Many of them also include an attack on your town, which you need to prepare for adequately or suffer the consequences.

The goal of the game is to make it to the final round without your town being destroyed, while also fulfilling the objective you rolled at the start of the game.

—description from the designer

User summary
テバトリ (TEBA TORI) is a Japanese memo game. Teba means 'wing' and Tori is 'chicken', so Teba Tori is fried chicken wings.

Deep fried chicken wing tip, called TEBASAKI in Japan, is one of Nagoya's spacialties. In the game of TEBA TORI, you score points by completing a set of TEBASAKI, Beer, and Towel (to wipe grease out of your fingers).

During your turn, you flip three tiles. If you have flipped TEBASAKI, Beer, and Towel, you score points depending on the number of TEBASAKI on the tile. If you have flipped Bone, however, you must return a set you have collected to the playfield.

It is recommended to read the tile name each time a tile is flipped so that the game gets heated.

You win the game if you have collected the most TEBASAKI among players.

Publisher's summary
名古屋で人気の手羽先唐揚げをビールとおしぼりとセットにしてたくさん食べた人の勝ち。
裏向きでランダムに並べた24枚の六角形タイルを、手番が来たら3枚めくり「手羽先」（chicken)「ビール」(beer)「おしぼり」(towel)の組み合わせを作れたらもらえます。めくったタイルをみんなで声に出していくと盛り上がるよ。
もしも「ほね」（born)をめくったら、自分が得たセットを1セット場に返さなくてはならず、全体を混ぜてゲーム再開！
designers: BELL and MARSHA (ベル と マーシャ)
publishers: Banjo Yugi Seisakujo BGM (盤上遊戯製作所 BGM)

boardgame: Fix och Foxi på äventyr i skogen
description: You have two playing pieces who you want to move as fast you can thru the forest. It is always the playing piece that is furthest away from goal that have to move every time. At 10 spaces it will happen special things in the forest. The player that lands on these spaces have to roll a color-dice with only red and green fields and do the outcome of the die.

You walking along a fruit-path and the first one reaching the fruit-basket wins.

There is seven spots on the board where tiles with the path fruit are placed face down except for one who is face up.
On your turn you throw the color-die and move to the closest space with that color. The player have then to reveal the fruit that is on the space they moved to, to stay there. If the player fail to reveal correct fruit they have to move backwards to the closets space with the fruit they revealed.

The wicked queen is back! Now she has taken away Snow White and holds her captive at the castle. You and your fellow players are the seven dwarfs, and now you have to leave the mine on a dangerous trip through the woods and into the castle's dark halls to free Snow White. Whoever can find Snow White has won the game!

An easy dice game where you move and do what the place you go to shows. In the castle you go to different rooms and look for Snow White. This is done by lifting a card. The one who finds Snow White first wins.

—user summary
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Snow White

description:
A set of 6 cards originally available during the Kickstarter campaign for Lockup: A Roll Player Tale. They had a pledge level just for these cards.

Cards include:
Weapon Card: Ancestral Blade 
Scroll Card: Transmute* 
Minion Card: Insectoid* 
Minion Card: Ratman* 
Minion Card: Nightmare* 
Minion Card: Flayer*


    Requires the Roll Player: Monsters & Minions Expansion.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
This is a therapeutic educational game designed to help children cope with stressful situations.

Players roll dice and consult a Symptoms Chart with a whimsical cartoon illustration of a stressed-out dinosaur. The active player chooses a Control Card or a Relaxation Card in response. If the text on the card increases that player's anxiety he or she must take a Stress Rock chip. A player stuck with a Victim Card gets hit on the head with a foam rock. The player then describes how he or she will deal with this stressful event.

EXAMPLE: The child is stressed "when his Dad hogs the TV."

The object of the game is to get rid of all Stress Rocks in a player's possession.

Designed for kids age six and older to play with a parent, teacher, or therapist.

Includes charts, cards, dice, chips, rules, and a large chunk of foam granite.

—user summary

boardgame: Horizon Zero Dawn: The Board Game – The Heart of the Nora
description:
The Heart of the Nora is an alternate play mode expansion, allowing players to enjoy the game as some of their favourite characters from Horizon Zero Dawn and replay this iconic quest from the videogame. This expansion features the ancient war machines from the time of the old ones - a Deathbringer, and two Corruptors, as well as reference and behaviour cards for these powerful enemies. It also features additional tiles and a deck to allow players to replay the quest, replacing the tracking cards found in the main game.

—description from the publisher

In 2018, German publisher AMIGO released a special edition of the Bohnanza base game in a marketing partnership with the food production company ültje that contains six bonus peanut cards. ("Peanut" in German is "Erdnuss".)

The game plays as traditional Bohnanza, with players trading cards and planting beans in fields in order to score points. While normally each type of bean must stand on its own in a field, the peanut card can be played on any other type of bean. If a field is harvested with a peanut on top of it, the entire field is worthless (as the peanut thief has been caught in the act). If, however, the peanut is buried between two other beans in that field, then the field is worth one more taler than normal.

AMIGO notes that it produced 10,000 copies of this special edition.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

boardgame: Of Dreams & Shadows: Riding Horse Promo Card
description:
This is a promo card for Of Dreams & Shadows.

"Riding Horse" is a new resource card that you add to the resource deck at the beginning of the game.

It is a "Companion," with a cost of 1, and the following ability: "Gain an extra Move action during the Action phase."

It was released in Game Trade Magazine #224 (October 2018).

boardgame: Tower of Madness: Dr. Jin Wu Promo Card
description:
This is a promo card for Tower of Madness.

"Dr. Jin Wu" is a new investigator card, allowing players an extra investigator to choose from at the beginning of the game.

Her ability is: "Jin counts each Madness marble as 5 points toward her victory, until she goes Insane."

This promo card was distributed in Game Trade Magazine #224 (October 2018).

Fall's Leaves Fall is a roll and write game about us as drafts that help Autumn leaves fall to the ground from a tree.

Pretty simple, right?

Well, the are 2 small restrictions for movement and in your way down you get to take victory points from other leaves you meet, dandelions and get bonuses from various sources, plus in your personal board you can have a set collection bonus plus a bonus if you reach down first!

All you need is to print the main board, the player board and the rules, get six dice and as many colored pencils as the number of players and start rolling and falling !!!

—description from the designer

boardgame: A Pleasant Journey to Neko: Penguin Habitat 1
description:
This promo card "Penguin Habitat" is for Essen Spiel'18.

When use the advanced setup of this game, add this card to other advanced cards. Shuffle all the advanced card and draw three of them without looking the front and put those cards on designated space in main board.

Penguin Habitat: When the game ends, each special stop gives you 3 points including this card.

-description from designer

boardgame: A Pleasant Journey to Neko: Whale Watching Mini-Expansion
description:
The mini-expansion included 4 cards (plus a 5th card that contains a summary of the rules). Two of them used for 1st period and the remaining two used for 2nd period.

Setup

When setting up the game, reveal two 1st period Whale Watching cards and display them next to main board. When the next period begins, reveal two 2nd period Whale Watching cards and display them next to main board.

Bidding

You can bid for those cards during Action Phase as well. Unlike other cards, the rules for resolving Whale Watching are changed as follow:

You still use dice to bid Whale Watching and the basic rule of bidding remains unchanged, but this time when you resolve the card, ignore the number of a dice. The more dice you use to bid the card than other player, you win the bid. If there is a tie, the player who has prior turn order wins the bid.

Effect

Whenever a ship passes through Whale Watching, you get the items that are shown on the card immediately.

Note: If you add advance cards in a game, you should resolve the card in bidding area and then resolve the advance card in order if any players bid them. Whale Watching will resolve in order very last.

-description from designer

User summary
大量絶滅 (Tairyou Zetsumetsu) is a Japanese game of Mass Extinction.

Trilobites have been prosperous for approximately 300 million years from the early Cambrian to the end of Permian, but the time is coming that they are about to die out. They have survived many times of extinction events and following changes of ecosystem by evolving into various forms. Though having survived through Cambrian, Ordovician, Devonian periods, they are eradicated in the End-Permian extinction.

Mass Extinction is a game with a theme of survival and evolution of trilobites. They will be rewarded each time they survive a catastrophic event. Even death of an individual might trigger an evolution for the species.

With the doomed future ahead, which species will enjoy the most prosperous ending?

カンブリア紀初期からペルム紀末までの約3億年にわたって繁栄を続けてきた三葉虫にも絶滅の時が迫ってきました。
今まで、何度も大量絶滅が発生し、その度に生態系は一変しました。
三葉虫も様々な進化を遂げることによって生き延びてきたのです。
カンブリア紀後期、オルドビヌス紀末、デボン紀・・・そして、ペルム紀末の史上最大の大量絶滅の際に、三葉虫も種自体が絶滅してしまうのです。

このゲームは、そんな三葉虫たちの生存競争および進化をテーマとしています。
ときおり訪れる天変地異に耐え抜いた三葉虫たちは大いなる褒美が与えられることでしょう。
また、1個体が死ぬことによって、その種族としては進化の足がかりを掴むかもしれません。
絶滅を目前に控え、束の間の繁栄を極めるのは、どの三葉虫でしょうか。

Keyflower: Developer is a new village tile for the game Keyflower. The rules for the Developer tile are as follows:

The owner of the developer scores 2 points (or 3 points if the tile has been upgraded) for each upgrade icon that is on an adjacent tile.

—description from the publisher

User summary
七味ならべ (Shitimi Narabe) is a Japanese game of speed and recognition. (Shichimi is standard spelling rather than Shitimi).

Shitimi Togarashi is a Japanese spice mixture, which contains red chili pepper and six other ingredients which vary depending on producers.

In the game of Shitimi Narabe, you form a set of seven spices including chili pepper faster than anyone else.

You have an identical deck of 35 cards in which 13 types of ingredient are included. Spread four cards in front of you. If you think you need one of these cards to make a correct shichimi, place the card to your blend pile, then refill the space in front of you. The correct shichimi is: any number of chili pepper cards and six cards of different types, but never include habanero or the whole shitimi is spoiled.

Players race to make their shitimi, and the first player who has made a correct shitimi is the winner.

Publisher's summary
「七味唐辛子」は、日本のミックススパイスの名称です。唐辛子が主原料で、７種類の香辛料を組み合わせて作られています。
１２種類の香辛料を組み合わせ誰よりもすばやく七味唐辛子をつくれば勝利です。

１２種の香辛料を組み合わせ七味唐辛子すばやく正確につくります
主原料の唐辛子以外は、１枚ずつ揃えます！
相手より素早く正確に七味唐辛子をつくりましょう！

Tumult is a checkers variant where both players jump over the tokens of the opponent to remove them from the board.
The player with the most remaining tokens on the board wins.

This is a travel game version.

Quintro is a simple game similar to Tic-Tac-Toe. Only instead of three in a row, the winner must connect five in a row.

This is part of a travel game edition from Spear.

mini-go is a checkers variant where both players try to enclose the opponent's tokens in order to remove them from the board.
The player which only has three tokens left looses the game.

This is part of a travel game edition from Spear.

bastion is a checkers variant. The player with the white tokens tries to reach all red places or to enclose the black tokens of the other player. The player with the black tokens tries to remove at least 16 white tokens from the board by jumping over them. 
The winner is the player who reaches his goal first.

This game is part of a travel game edition from Spear.
wirrwarr is a one person logic game. The player tries to arrange all the tokens in a specific order by moving to adjacent files in a minimum number of turns
Players are travelling to Rome. On their way, they answer several questions about ancient Rome.
Funny question and answer game. Each player has his own cards and reads a question to the next player who answers with the answer on his card.

A card game about soccer
The starting player play a card and the next players try to find a next logical move by playing a new card. The winner is the player who managed to get rid off his cards before the others do so.

boardgame: Arschkeks: Wirst du es packen oder verkacken?
description:
Party Game.
85 challenge and special cards, 1 die, 1 Arschkeks (Ass Cookie).
The player who has the "Arschkeks" is the active player. He draws a card and tries to do the challenge. If he is successful he gets the points which are written on the card. After his challenge he selects the next player.
If the player does not succeed he gets a punishment.
Examples for challenges:

     Call your the other players "Arschkeks" for 5 minutes.
     Hold your chair with your outstretched arm for 30 seconds.


Example for Punishments:

     Jump 1 minute on the place and say with each jump idiot
     10 knee bends


Special cards: suspend (stay in pushup positon till the next player has done his challenge), take 2 cards (draw 2 and do both), creativ card (make your own challenge for 1-3 players), joker (you may ignore 1 punishment, if you don't want to do a challenge)

boardgame: 勇者アーキテクト (Brave Architect)
description:
User summary
勇者アーキテクト (Brave Architect) (Yuusha Architect) is a Japanese co-operative card game. Technically, the English version of the title is closer to 'Architect of the Brave', as you construct your heroes. This game was followed by two other editions that can be mixed, but not with this base game.

勇者アーキテクト (Brave Architect), like a TRPG, is a co-operative card game to create characters for each player and fight the dragon.

Create your characters by selecting from 7 types of tribes, 8 types of weapons, 2 types of combat styles for each weapon, 10 types of sub weapons, and 18 types of skills. Shuffle the cards of the selected category into decks for each player. The players then use their decks to battle on the map.

The enemy's dragon is also automatically formed for each game and attacks the players' characters with multiple attributes. Survive the enemy attacks, destroy the parts, raise your characters' levels and fight the dragon.

Publisher summary
TRPGのように、プレイヤーごとにキャラクターを作ってドラゴンを討伐する協力型カードゲームです。
キャラクター（種族）７種類、武器８種類と武器ごとに戦闘スタイル２種類、 サブウェポン１０種類、スキル１８種類から好きな組み合わせを選んでキャラメイクします。
選んだカテゴリーのカードを混ぜてプレイヤーごとのデッキとします。
プレイヤーはこのデッキを使ってマップ上で戦闘を繰り広げます。
敵のドラゴンも遊ぶたびに変わる自動キャラメイクで、複数の属性を持ちキャラクターに襲いかかってきます。敵の猛攻を潜り抜け、パーツを破壊し、レベルを上げてドラゴンを討伐しましょう。
artists: Jewel Saver FREE (ジュエルセイバーFREE)

description:
This game is played with a large spinning circle (dial) that is divided into four colors (red, yellow, blue, green).  Each section has holes for 5 colored pegs as the same color as the quarter section.  Each player decides which color they want to play and then takes the 5 pegs of their color.  Each player, in turn, spins the dial.  There is an arrow in the corner of the box.  Whichever color the arrow is pointing at when the dial stops, the player of that color gets to put one of their pegs in one of the holes of that color, regardless of which player spun the dial.
Winner is the first person who has succeeded in getting all 5 of their pegs into their colored area.

User summary
ポプボブ (Popubobu) (POP & BOB) is a very fast party game themed on the manga/anime Pop Team Epic. (You can play it without knowing the show.) The game takes under a minute to pay.

There are mainly 2 types of cards to play, one with ポプテピピック ("Pop Team Epic") printed on it and the other with ボブネミミッミ ("Bob Epic Team") on it. First,randomly deal one of these cards to each player. During the game, each player can only speak the words on the cards dealt to them.

Next, deal another card to each player. Each player must show this card to other players but not see it themselves (like in the game of Indian Poker). Players must tell the others if other players' cards are ポプテピピック ("Pop Team Epic") or ボブネミミッミ ("Bob Epic Team"), and they will win if they all manage to guess their cards correctly.

However, this is quite a confusing challenge, because each player can only utter the word on the card dealt to them. The rules of this game can be explained in 1 to 2 minutes and it can be played in 30 seconds or so, with up to 9 players.

Publisher's summary
「ポプテピピック」の二次創作パーティーゲームです。（作品を知らなくても遊べます）
主に「ポプテピピック」と書かれたカードと「ボブネミミッミ」と書かれたカードの２種類を使って遊びます。まずランダムにこれらのカードを書くプレイヤーに配ります。このゲーム中そのプレイヤーは配られたカードの単語しか話せません。
次にもう１枚ずつカードを配り、同時にカードを他のプレイヤーに向けて公開します。（インディアンポーカーです）。
プレイヤーは、他のプレイヤーのカードが「ポプテピピック」と「ボブネミミッミ」のどちらかを教えて全員が正解すればプレイヤーの勝利となります。
ただし最初に配られたカードの単語しか話せないので大変なことになります。
ゲーム説明に１～２分、ゲームプレイ時間は30秒、最大で９人まで遊べます。

Build Roads - Connect Cities - Sabotage Friends

Better be quick and smart - the newly minted transportation commissioner has approached your company to devise a road network to connect all the cities; however the commissioner has also contacted your biggest rivals too. Who is going to win the contract? It’s anyone’s game and you’ll stop at nothing to get the job done – even if it takes sabotage. But your rivals feel the same…

Draw your tiles and place them efficiently to connect all your cities while avoiding sabotage from your opponent's road closures. Be the first to successfully connect all your cities to at least two other cities and you will win the contract (and the game).

—description from the designer

Criss-cross the USA in a race to obtain a million miles!

Fasten your seatbelt and prepare for takeoff, as you are about to embark on a sprint to a million miles! The skies ahead are turbulent and unpredictable. Bad weather, traffic delays and disgruntled passengers will all conspire against you as you and your fellow competitors criss-cross the country in a race to determine who will be crowned the Million Mile Flyer.

Along the way you will have the opportunity to impede your opponents progress, but keep in mind what ever misfortune you visit on others will likely be returned. But that's all part of the fun. The game is unpredictable and your circumstances can literally change in the blink of an eye.

Frequent travelers will find themselves reliving their own air travel nightmares in a humorous setting while kids will love the nonstop, action packed race to the finish line.

—descriptoion from the designer

Sit down and grab a glass because here comes a story...

You've plundered the dungeon and come away with a solid and heavy treasure chest. After struggling to break the lock, to everyone's surprise, the chest was full of...potions! In Brewitched, you are adventurers sharing and tasting unknown potions to discover which ones are the most powerful (and valuable).

Spend your action points to smell, switch, drink, and throw away a potion or use one of the eight characters' special abilities. But be careful! Some of the potions are cursed, and this curse will be represented in real life... The results will be hilarious!

A DRINKING GAME (OR NOT)
Fun with or without drinks!
Play with younger players or designated drivers.

The Annex expansion allows thieves to play with more friends. The game, made for 2-4, is now expanded up to 6 players.

This expansion includes:

     9 new room tiles
     2 new thieves
     2 new treasures 
     10 additional search deck cards

Mine Carts is a game in which the players together explore an abandoned mine, looking for precious ores!

The abandoned mine is represented by a six by six grid on a board. The players start with two player figures each at the edges and take turns placing square tiles with tracks leading into the mine. They follow the tracks and may stumble upon ore deposits when doing so. Mining an ore deposit yields an ore token that may be more or less valuable.

Throughout the game, players will find themselves colliding with other players. Players that collide will loose their player figures and will, when no player figures remain, be eliminated from the game. However, eliminated players haven't automatically lost the game. They may still win, granted that they managed to collect the most precious ores before being eliminated!

Clever players may find ways to mine the ore deposits while also eliminating other players!

—description from the designer

A mini-expansion for Montana released at Essen 2018.

Replace one of each player's settlement with a trade post during the setup.
During the game each player can build his settlement by paying its cost with money instead of goods.

-description from publisher

Once upon a time, there’s was kingdom nobody knows. Everybody wanted to marry the young, wise, beautiful princess, even though they knew she could be troublesome sometimes. One day the princess said “The man who brings me a handful of these flowers will be my husband”. The “task” the princess proposed wasn’t easy at all for the flower she named was “Gem Flower” which can only be raised in dead-cold weather. Now the battle of suitors has begun.

You’re one of the suitors who gained relative’s support to acquire “Gem Flower”. You are in the coldest county of the nation where you can find “Gem Seeds”. Whoever gathered enough seeds to obtain 2 Flowers(20 Seeds) is the winner.

Players put one of the cards they have face down to determine “Sunity”(The higher the number, the more sun you see) each round. There are numbers from 1 to 50. The “Sunity” will determine which regions will be hit by blizzards. One of the numbers played this round will become current “Sunity”.
Once all players played their cards, each player guess current “Sunity” and move one of their player tokens to a region on the game board.

The numbers (10~40) shown on the game board is the required Sunity in order to receive reward from that particular region. The regions with the numbers less than equal to Sunity will be hit by a blizzard.  When everyone moved their player tokens, turn all the played cards face up and determine Sunity.

All the player tokens that were hit by blizzards will be removed from the game board and sent back to their hometowns. Players will receive rewards from each player tokens remained on the game board. The number +1~+4 shows how many seeds you can receive from each region.

Avoid blizzards by figuring out Sunity and become the first one to acquire Gem Flower!

Interference! is a game in which two players attempt to save the world from utter destruction.

You are the operators of a missile control mainframe and due to a slight human error, the total annihilation of the world is looming! The systems have locked you out and you can only rely on your hacking skills to regain control.

The mainframe's lock is represented by four double-sided cards that are shared between the two players. Both players hold a hand of secret action cards as well as a card showing a secret target sequence.

Using their action cards, the players struggle to change the lock sequence into their target sequence. This will break a layer of the mainframe's security system and help the players regain control.

Will the two players prevail and save the world or should we all seek immediate shelter? The fate of the world is in your hands!

—description from the designer

In 7 for the Queen, players compete to create a new necklace for the Queen, but it is not easy to meet her ever-changing needs and desires, and they have to ensure they have the right combination when the Queen finally decides what she wants.

7 for the Queen won the annual "Best Unpublished Game" competition sponsored by dV Giochi and Lucca Comics and Games, and this limited edition of the game is part of the reward.

The elements have become misaligned and are causing all sorts of trouble in the world. Severe drought, hurricane after hurricane and yet another super hero movie that no one asked for are just some of the plagues the world has had to live through. In Prima Materia, the players struggle to align the elements in an effort to make all things good again.

The elements are represented by sixteen double-sided cards showing one of the four classical elements on each side. These cards are arranged in a grid of four by four cards. Each player holds a secret hand of action cards as well as a card with a secret target sequence. The players use their action cards to change the elemental cards and gain points for each sequence they manage to form.

Will the elements realign and introduce stability in the world? Or will we face a future of starvation, war and reggaeton music?

—description from the designer

Why go to the same boring job every day in order to receive a steady and predictable income when you can start working in the gig economy? The gig economy allows you to get all of the drawbacks and none of the benefits while struggling to make ends meet.

In Home Delivery, the players take on work as traveling popsicle sellers. The players take turns placing rectangular city tiles forming the road network of the city. In some parts of the city, there lives popsicle-craving residents with very specific tastes. They will gladly purchase a popsicle but it will have to be of the correct flavor.

Each player can take on tasks from the local ice cream parlors, delivering a set of popsicles to the residents. For every task that a player completes, they are awarded with a small paycheck. The players may save their paychecks to pay for things like rent and food or may use their pay to gain a competitive advantage over their fellow popsicle sellers.

Have you ever dreamt of owning your very own ice cream truck? Well forget about that. You're part of generation rent and this is the gig economy so all you can afford is to rent one and hope that your investment pays off!

So what are you waiting for? Quit your day job and become part of the new economy. It's gonna be huge.

—description from the designer

Four Imperial Settlers tiles, that give you additional options and actions!

Printed on high quality cardboard, those four tiles include a marketplace, which your faction can access and discover a new action available for your Empire!

—description from the publisher

In Homebrew: The Potion Brewing Game, the players venture down into the haunted basement of their house. The players are attempting to brew magic potions and need to find the correct ingredients, but someone has left the basement in a terrible mess!

In every room of the basement, one of six different magic ingredients is to be found. The players each hold secret recipe cards and take turns exploring the basement by placing new rooms next to the existing ones.

When a player manages to find the ingredients required to brew their special magic potion, they gain a point. The player having brewed the most potions when the basement is fully explored becomes the potion master and wins the game!

—description from the designer

User summary
BodoCa is short for 'Board Game's Card Game'. It is a Japanese card game with only Japanese text on the cards, so is very language dependent as is.

BodoCa is a party trivia card game about board games. The cards contain board game attributes such as theme, component, or designer. There are two play styles: expert and family.

For the family game, the game flow is similar to 20 questions. Each player, except the leader, has a hand of ten cards. The leader thinks of a game, then the players use their cards to narrow down the title. The person who guesses correctly wins the round.

For the expert game style, players are dealt a hand of cards, then each play one card. Players then try to come up with games that fit the criteria described by the cards in play.
publishers: Colorful Spiele (カラフルシュピーレ)

description:
ちぇいにんぐ (Cheiningu) is a card game where players try to, or not to, connect two cards of the same color (Cheiningu means 'chaining').

There are 90 cards, 10 cards for each of 9 colors, in the game. The game is published in Japanese but is language free in gameplay.

Players take turns placing a card on the table to form a four-column grid. When a pair of cards of the same color are connected, orthogonally or diagonally, that player takes these cards and scores points, and the taken spaces are filled by existing cards in a certain rule. If another pair is made, that player takes them and scores again, which is called chaining. Repeat the process until no pairs are made.

There are several game modes. In one mode, you just draw a card and place it, and you should take as many cards as possible. In another mode, you choose one from your hand of two cards, and you score negative points if a single pair is made in a turn; only chainings are counted positive.

In another game, special cards may be added to change the rules slightly.

Depending on the game mode, the player with the most positive points or the least negative points wins the game.

—User summary

同じ色が縦・横・斜めのいずれかに揃えばカードをゲット♪ 
カードを集めたり、マイナス点として押し付けたり… 
付属のカードで遊び方いろいろです♪
小さいお子さんから大人の方までみんなで遊べるカードゲーム！
《プレイ時間10〜15分・プレイ人数2〜10人》 基本の遊び方は2種類。 
さらに発展ルールで遊び方のバリエーションが増えます。 
一撃堂オリジナルゲーム第1作目 カードゲーム「ちぇいにんぐ」

In Vertical, you play a mountaineer on an evolving, demanding cliff face, competing against ruthless competitors to climb, which will be a problem since you've forgotten some of your equipment...
Clash with your opponents on a trail full of pitfalls. In Car Clash, you build your track, construct your vehicle, and face your opponents throughout a thrilling race.
The Parisian metro is a true labyrinth. In Metro, you must assemble your metro line and be the first to reach your destination, taking as few connections as possible.

boardgame: 勇者アーキテクト 2B (Brave Architect 2B)
description:
Publisher's summary
勇者アーキテクト 2B (Brave Architect 2B) (Yuusha Architect 2B) is a follow-up to the original game 勇者アーキテクト (Brave Architect). Brave Architect 2B is a separate stand-alone game and cannot be mixed with the original. But it can be mixed with the matching game 勇者アーキテクト 2R (Brave Architect 2R). Both games Brave Architect 2B and 2R share the same rules but their contents are different.

Brave Architect 2B is a cooperative role-playing game to create characters (through LCG and mini-deck-building systems) and fight the dragon. The game title in Japanese is closer to 'Architect of the Brave'.

This is a co-operative card game to create characters for each TRPG player, in the world of sword and magic and fights against mighty enemies. Create your characters by selecting from 8 types of tribes, 10 types of weapons, 3 types of combat styles for each weapon, 10 types of sub weapons, and 24 types of skills.

Shuffle the cards of the selected category into decks use them to battle on the map. Play the game with various patterns, with up to 4 types of maps, 4 types of enemies × 10 attributes. Use your decks and various skills effectively and work together to defeat the mighty enemies.

勇者ーキテクト2B・2Rはキャラメイク（LCG・ミニデッキ構築）＆協力討伐系RPカードゲームです。

剣と魔法の世界を舞台に、TRPGプレイヤーごとにキャラクターを作成し、強大な敵を討伐する協力型カードゲームです。
キャラクター（種族）８種類、武器１０種類と武器ごとに戦闘スタイル３種類、サブウェポン１０種類、スキル２４種類から好きな組み合わせを選んでキャラメイクします。
選んだカテゴリーごとのカードでデッキを作成し、それを使ってマップ上で戦闘を繰り広げます。
マップは最大４種類、敵も４種類×１０属性とパターンは多彩です。
デッキと各種スキルを使いこなし、強力して強大な敵を倒しましょう。

2B・2Rは同じルールで内容物が異なっています。単独でも遊べて、混ぜて遊ぶこともできます。
前作の勇者アーキテクトと混ぜて遊ぶことはできません。
artists: Jewel Saver FREE (ジュエルセイバーFREE)

description:
Are you ready to take No Escape to the next level? The get ready for Salvation!
Avoid ALIENS attempting to capture, and most likely probe you.
Save other SURVIVORS, or just steal their stuff.
You can even play COOP to try to save the station together....or not.

It's YOUR game, customize it the way you want with the new Salvation expansion.

This expansion adds Alien rules with 8 alien meeples, 6 action tiles and 6 maze tiles. Survivor Rules with 20 survivor tokens, 8 maze tiles and 6 action tiles. And Coop Rules with 8 Mission tokens, 2 maze tiles and 6 action tiles.

-description from designer

boardgame: Last Full Measure: The Battle of Brandy Station
description:
In June of 1863 Alfred Pleasonton and the cavalry of the Army of the Potomac would face J.E.B. Stuart's cavalry of the Army of Northern Virginia near Culpepper Virginia in what would be the largest cavalry battle in North America.

Last Full Measure is a free print-and-play game system of battles of the American Civil War.  Brandy Station is the seventh game in the series.

A brigade scale game that uses regiment counters, as opposed to generic line markers, to spread the brigade over multiple hexes according to its size. Ranged artillery fire, cavalry charges, command and control, all in only eight pages of rules. Play aids include Player-aid card with CRT and other charts and table; Eliminated Units card, Order of Arrival card, and 272 2-sided counters.

The Battle Book includes two Scenarios; Groveton, August 28th: The Full Battle and Longstreet Arrives, August 29th and an initial strength chart.

The map measures 39" x 35" at a scale of 250 yard per 3/4" hex.
AND just added (July 25, 2018), a 21" x 35" map extension to the west with a new Order of Arrival card to accommodate the new map.
A new ZunTzu box also incorporates the new map extension.

The full game is available for download at: http://UhlanGames.us
as are Zun Tzu gameboxes for all LFM games

boardgame: ひどらのしょうもうせん (Hydra's War of Attrition)
description:
ひどらのしょうもうせん (Hitora no Shousen) Hydra's War of Attrition is a Japanese 2 player abstract game with a horror theme.

Translated from the rules
"There are small hydras which inhabit a dangerous land full of evil spirits. They sluggishly move back and forth, sometimes running across one another. When that happens, they battle to the death."

User description
Each player places a trio of hydra tokens (Majoritei, Arakure, and Fushigi) on marked spaces along the edge of the board.  A turn then consists of the following steps: Multiplying the Majoritei, moving a hydra, and possibly removing opposing hydra pieces.

Players start by taking a Majoritei hydra from their supply and placing it next to another one already on the board. They then choose one of their hydra to move. Finally, if they've surrounded an opponent's hydra and at least one of their surrounding hyrda is on a nest of evil spirits, they capture their opponent's piece and return their piece from the nest to their supply.

These steps are repeated until one player can either form a line using six of their hydra, or until all of a player's hydra are captured.

Company level American Revolution wargame rules.

A5 Booklet of 51 pages, plus the 4-page Card Playsheets in the centre of the booklet.

These rules carry on from 'Ranger', used for the French-Indian Wars and have similar sections to 'File Leader', again by Pete Berry. Players who have played either of these two games will be familiar with the rules system.

Standard D6 used throughout.

description: In Race to Space, players embark on an epic battle of wits earning points and game advantages by completing mission quests. Avoid treacherous sabotages, swaps, steals and other shenanigans while navigating through mini games such as Rock-Paper-Scissors duels, instant win chances, and dice challenges. Blast off with this Space Age game designed to re-define learning as an out of this world experience! Finally, a game for kids who wish learning was fun!

You are a squad commander in charge of eight spaceships and five battle rings. A meteor has destroyed your planet, and you are searching for a new home. You are now in a race to capture two of the three remaining big planets to rule the galaxy. But beware you have an enemy with the same mission.

To win this intergalactic Orbit Battle, you need to use all your skill to outmaneuver your enemy and capture the planets.

The object of the game is to be the first player to capture two of the three big planets with three spaceships on each of the big planets. The first player who has invaded a big planet with three spaceships has captured that planet. When a player has invaded the big planet with three spaceships, the other player cannot enter this planet anymore.

Ojczysty ("Native") is a party game in which Polish language will surprise you with its wealth. More than hundred unusual words. Their meanings are explained on the cards. One of the six words on the board will be your hidden goal. Your task is to guess it with the help of clue cards provided by another player. Will you risk betting only one answer...?
 
The game was published as part of the social and educational campaign "Native - add to favorites", run by the National Center for Culture since 2012. Its aim is to shape the linguistic awareness of Poles and to promote care for the correctness of the Polish language.

—description from the designer

Pestka, drops, cukierek is a kid's journey to the world of economics. The game presents the basic mechanisms of demand and supply in an accessible way, and at the same time it tells an extraordinary story of a mysterious land hidden in Julek's pocket. The evil king forbids everything that gives joy, health and happiness! Your task is to make the magical land be vibrant again. But you must hurry - the evil king raises funds to pay for the army, which is to punish the rebel residents. The fate of the kingdom is in your hands!

The game was created on the basis of a book by one of the most valued Polish writers for children - Grzegorz Kasdepke.

Gameplay:
There are 7 action fields on the board. In your turn, you can move to any field in a clockwise direction (Players themselves choose how many squares they will move their pawn. But the consequence of this quick free access to various actions is the increasing frequency of paying tribute to the king.) On the action field, a player can perform the appropriate action: draw resources, change them into "goods" (for example a pencil into a picture), sell "goods" to inhabitants of gray houses or exchange resources. After each action, active player asks others if they want to pay him 1 coin to do the same action in a limited way.

The game may end in two ways: When the number of gray houses is smaller than the number of players - then the player with the most coins is the winner; When the royal treasury is full, then everybody lose.

—description from the designer

DisgRace To The White House is a fast-paced, strategic, and satirical board game for energized progressives everywhere. In between protesting, marching, and crying into your pillow--why not laugh too? DisgRace To The White House provides catharsis and the roadmap to resistance during these trying, rights-depleted, tiny-hands times. Players brush up on America's horribly archaic Electoral College system as well as DJT's certifiably insane Tweets, as they navigate the election in a race to the White House.

While battling for electoral votes, players impersonate Trump's "unique" form of verbal diarrhea, quote mind-bending Tweets, and pick up "Disaster" Cards, all in the name of winning the oval office through alternative facts. Interactive, team-building and generally outrageous, players shriek, squeal, and laugh--all at the same time. Gameplay constantly shifts until a winner is crowned (poor choice of words). You're never assured of victory until the bitter end (sorry "Haters and Losers!"). A perfect gift--play it around the trashcan fire when the Trumpocalypse finally comes!

—description from the designers

Zwoggels are cute little creatures who live under stones, but nobody wants to encounter them three times. Why? Because then you have to take home one of the three, and whoever does this three times is eliminated — from the game, that is.

Gameplay in Zwoggel is simple: Flip two tiles face up, then place three new tiles face down and hope someone else falls into your trap. If you reveal three zwoggels of the same color in a row, then you have to take one home. Hope you can avoid finding more in the future...

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Knights of Casterly Rock
description:
The Lannisters spare no expense when it comes to outfitting their troops. Even the regular line soldier has the finest in arms and armor. So, when it comes to a unit as special as their mounted knights, cost is never an issue. The Knights of Casterly Rock have literally the best equipment and training that money can buy. And they are worth every penny on the battlefield as they cut their way through enemy ranks.

The Lannister Knights of Casterly Rock Unit Box for the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game brings a fast, hard-hitting, and durable unit to the battlefield. Being cavalry, they get an extra movement at the start of their activation. They are also deadly on the Charge, with their weapons gaining Critical Blow and Sundering. Enemies will quickly become disheartened fighting them, being forced to make Panic Tests whenever the Knights survive a round of combat.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Lannister Heroes I
description:
Wars are fought with money, and in the War of the Five Kings, none of the Great Houses are more financially equipped than the Lannisters. They outfit their troops in the best armor and arm them with the finest steel. But troops still need leaders.

Some show their strength on the battlefield, like the Hound, Tyrion, or Lord Tywin. For others, like Maester Pycelle and the High Sparrow, their power is felt in the political arena. But make no mistake, they can influence the outcome of a battle all the same. The Lannister Heroes set for the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game gives players a powerful advantage in the war for the fate of Westeros.

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Stark Bowmen
description:
In battle, the goal is to defeat your opponent without being defeated, yourself. If you can attack your enemy and they cannot retaliate, that goes a long way to victory. For House Stark, that means employing skilled bowmen in their ranks. They have trained relentlessly in their everyday lives as trappers, rangers, and hunters. Now, they form up and send out steel-tipped death to the foes of the Direwolf.

The Stark Bowmen Unit Box provides a long-range option for Stark commanders in the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game. Though very lightly armored and not equipped for melee, they more than make up for it with their ability to put volley fire at enemies. They can even ignore line of sight requirements, arcing their arrows high into the air to strike at hidden targets.

description:
One thing remains true for the unaligned forces in the War of the Five Kings, whether they’re fighting for coin, self-interest, or simple survival, they always remain true to themselves. They are a wild card that can be added to any army in the game.

Some Heroes, like Roose Bolton and Ramsay Snow, are most at home on the battlefield alongside their men. Others, such as Petyr Baelish and Lord Varys, like to manipulate the situation behind-the-scenes. The Neutral Heroes set for the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game comes with everything a Commander needs to introduce some unknown elements into the war for the fate of Westeros.

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Bolton Flayed Men
description:
House Bolton has the most-armored unit on the field of battle. The Flayed Men cavalry are clad in heavy plate armor and their horses are equally armored in thick barding. Only the toughest and largest horses can withstand the great weight put upon them by all that steel. While they might not be the fastest cavalry unit, they are certainly the hardiest. And their own war flails make enemy defenses seem pointless as the spiked balls wrap around limbs or curve over shields.

The Bolton Flayed Men Unit Box for the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game allows Commanders to field a rough and rugged cavalry unit in their forces. As a Neutral unit, The Flayed Men will work for any army willing to pay their price. They have some of the best Defense Saves in the game, letting them stay on the field, utilizing their nasty war flails on the enemy for quite some time.

boardgame: A Song of Ice & Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game – Bolton Bastard's Girls
description:
Dogs have been used as part of the hunt for hundreds of years. Their keen sense of smell, swift running speed, and vicious bite have helped man put food on the table since their domestication. House Bolton, though, has trained dogs to not just hunt wild game, but men out on the field of battle. Accompanied by handlers, whose arrows help slow their prey, the dogs are quick to chew apart anyone they catch.

The Bolton Bastard’s Girls Unit Box for the A Song of Ice and Fire: Tabletop Miniatures Game allows Commanders to field this squad as part of their force. Being a Neutral unit, any house can hire them on. Lightly armored, these swift hunters can easily take down enemies with a combination of arrows and teeth.

description:
Mechanisms is a game of mechanisms.

To play, deal each player 3 Mechanism Cards and place the included hodgepodge of components within reach of everyone on a table. The first clue-giver is the person who most recently posted a comment on BoardGameGeek.

Starting with the first clue-giver, then clockwise, each clue-giver has 30 seconds to silently use the components on the table (as well as fellow players) as props to get someone to guess 2 of their Mechanism Cards. Clue-givers are encouraged to pair the mechanisms in a set of seemingly seamless actions as if they were playing a game with all mechanisms present. The guesser(s) gets the correctly guessed Mechanism Card as a point and the clue-giver gets the third Mechanism Card as a point if 2 mechanisms are guessed.

After everyone has had a turn, shuffle all non-point Mechanism cards and deal 2 new Mechanism cards to each player, continuing the game.

The player who collects 5 Mechanisms first this way, wins! As a finale, feel free to pitch a fun, creative, and unique game idea using all of your mechanism point cards!

—description from the designer

Is being a parent easy? Are your feelings of anxiety trolling you? If only life had some uncomplicated way to explain everything, like it used to be when all we had to worry about was our ABC's.

Parenting is Easy is a casual board game for 2 to 4 players, meant for high strung adults, hyperactive kids, or anyone in between. Quick and easy to learn, everyone's goal is to drive their parents completely insane by causing as much chaos as possible in their family home.

Magnio consists of unique and mesmerizing pieces that push, pull and shoot on each other - with the power of magnetism. Similar to a deck of cards, you’re not limited to a single game. You'll find several fun and attractive games in the box, but you will soon find yourself experimenting and playing with the pieces freehand. Now you'll be able to create your very own games, expanding the possibility of Magnio even further!

Magnetic air-hockey? No problem!

Magnetic curling? Create it!

It's a game designed for those that desire to think outside the box, or just want to casually play some magnetic dexterity action!

You're invited to explore the possibilities with hands-on demonstrations of physics and fun. Push, pull, and shoot magnets with other magnets as you manipulate the set. Create structures and sculptures, test your skills, create new games, and find even more ways to play. However you decide to use them, we're positive you'll enjoy the experience of Magination.

In this little card game you are trying to capture magical creature named Lirog. This old and powerfull but not too smart being, has something priceless in his posession. As one of the wizards you are trying to lure him into the trap using spells and forest fruits. In the deck there are 12 kind of cards with distiguish powers. Every player is trying to program the game area, so that after activation, Lirog will enter their trap.

There are only 52 cards in the deck. At the start of the game players recive 3 random cards each. In a specified order they can  put one card on the game board and take 1 card from the market or take 2 cards from the market. After all players finished their turns, creature will make his moves. Depending on  cards that affect him, he will move  around the game board. If during move phase Lirog enters one of the traps, the game ends. Owner of that trap becomes the winner.

—description from the publisher

Minicity, the funnest game to learn English with friends. Explore this coloring and exciting city full of surprises!

It consists of a colorful and vibrant circular board where you can move from the launch of a dice. Players start at the Bank, then passing through different places and stores in the miniature city. They can buy all the places and adding workers and products related to every place or shop. And all in English!

Every time players stop at the social media icons, they receive “social media messages” through the messages cards and get ready for different surprises and actions to do at MiniCity. They can be lucky, or not so much!

Players can role play to “work” as a bank teller or a realtor while playing. Also, they can use Minicity cars and taxi, if getting some of the lucky messages.

The player with the most places and most money at the end of the game will be the winner.

boardgame: Food Chain Magnate: The Ketchup Mechanism & Other Ideas
description:
"Chef! Some of our guests are asking for ketchup. Do we have any?" "We don't serve ketchup in this company." "Also they are asking whether the restaurant will expand anytime soon? There's a restaurant in the new quarter and with all the roadwork lately, it is getting a lot of traffic." "Can't you see I am working on my new masterpiece? How can I concentrate like this? I need that Michelin star! And this new sushi dish is just the thing. Or maybe if I combine kimchi with ice cream..." "But chef. Your guests are not asking for fancy stuff; they want ketchup and coffee. And better decorations. And a new menu." "Get out of my kitchen. Now!"

The Ketchup Mechanism & Other Ideas is an expansion for Food Chain Magnate.

Includes:

     a new set of milestones that completely changes strategic options
     coffee and barista's: places where people stop on the way to get food
     new districts with different types of buildings
     lobbyists that can place parks and new roads
     new types of food: kimchi, sushi & noodles
     new marketing types: mass marketeers, rural marketeers and gourmet food critics
     new employees: French fries; movie stars and working the night shift 
     hard choices
     materials to play with 6 players
     ketchup!

Four card promo set from Gen Con 2018 includes:

Dr. Jin Wu
Officer Brady

In Fugue, your mind has split and is at war with itself. You must leverage your imagination, vision, depth, passion, and spirit to dominate your opponents and wrestle back control of your mind.

By using tile sets and Fugues, you will move Mind tiles from one area of the mind to another, and into your Passion area where they are scored. But be warned, you are not the only force inside the mind.

Fugue is a deceptively simple tile placement game for 1-4 mental forces.

Live on Kickstarter!

Visit www.lostagegames.com for more info

boardgame: Drinking Games for People Who Never Drink Except When They Do
description:
A collection of 50 drinking games broken into six different categories: active, drinking, improv, team, word and stupid. Some games are old standards (but with a new twist), while others are little known. Whether it be a pregame, vision quest or full-blown mass cult suicide - there's a game here to suit every get-together!

From the creators of the game, "DRUNK STONED OR STUPID," games are customizable to play with or without drinking.

Don't let this little box fool you...it's stuffed with tons of interesting trivia questions that'll have you thinking, laughing, and wracking your brains!  Juicy little tidbits of useless knowledge!

Put on your smarty pants and have a ball!  Play for hours and collect 'em all!

This cute little box contains a game board, 4 pawns, a die, 500 questions on cards, rules, and unquantifiable fun.  Seriously.

—description from the box
